title: viola frank-smithii
intro: Viola frank-smithii, also known as Frank's violet, is a perennial flowering plant native to the western United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. Frank's violet has been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, due to its high antioxidant content. The plant is often prepared as a salve, ointment, or infused oil, and can also be consumed as a tea or capsule to take advantage of its health benefits.
